response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Found 2 command(s) for misc: *RST, ALLEv","findings":["*RST — This command (no query form) resets the instrument to the factory default settin","ALLEv — This query-only command prompts the instrument to return all events and their me"],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":null,"newStep":{"id":"smart_scpi_1","type":"write","label":"Set *RST","params":{"command":"*RST"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":null,"newStep":{"id":"smart_scpi_2","type":"query","label":"Query ALLEv","params":{"command":"ALLEv?","saveAs":"result_allev"}}}]}

findings: *RST — This command (no query form) resets the instrument to the factory default settin
ALLEv — This query-only command prompts the instrument to return all events and their me
